name: Seal of the Battle God
description: Notes Part of the Agents of Oryx Abilities.
effects: On party: Inflicts Damaging for 5 seconds within 5.5 squaresStagger: When used below 50% HP, inflicts Armored on self for 2 seconds.Cooldown: 2 second(s)Counter: When used above 50% HP, inflicts ATT Boost (+100 ATT) on self for 0.6 seconds.Cooldown: 1.8 second(s)
